inputs.breaking_change: flowctl validate now requires a maturity rubric in every production flow README.
inputs.audience: Maintainers with existing flows that lack a rubric section.

expected_outputs.migration_guide:
## Old vs new
Old: READMEs were optional prose. New: production flow READMEs must contain a '## Maturity rubric'. ## Steps
1. Add the rubric section. 2. Run flowctl report. ## Rollback
Pin the previous flowctl release until rubrics are added.

steps: Add a '## Maturity rubric' section to each flow README
Run flowctl report to confirm no missing-rubric issues
Rollback: pin the previous flowctl release if needed

notes: Writes a migration guide comparing old and new behavior with ordered steps and a rollback.
